description_long: This is a light gray baseball cap with a structured, six-panel design and a slightly curved brim. The front features a raised, stylized bird logo outlined in a darker gray, adding a subtle decorative touch. The cap has stitched ventilation eyelets on each panel for breathability and a fabric-covered button at the crown. The back of the cap includes an open section, likely for an adjustable strap, which is typical for this style. The fabric appears to be a soft, woven material, possibly cotton or a cotton blend, with a matte finish. The overall look is clean and modern, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A light gray baseball cap with a curved brim and a raised bird logo on the front, featuring stitched eyelets and an open back for adjustment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the raised bird logo and the structured, curved brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted fabric panels and stitched eyelets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back section, likely for an adjustable strap.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the logo's edge and panel stitching.
